title: Monkey In A Cage
overview: TV star Samar's life spirals when his ex Gayatri accuses him of rape after he blocks contact with her. Despite his new relationship with Khushi, he faces arrest and encounters a corrupt justice system.

title: Naina
overview: 3 Majnus And 33 Lailas !!!!!!  Just Imagine The Chaos................

title: Vo Ladki
overview: Pathik, decides to move on from every memory of Devyani and goes to meet her one last time with a thought of returning the wrist watch.

title: Maa Behen
overview: In this dark comedy, a woman calls her estranged daughters in the middle of the night with chilling news — there's a dead body in her kitchen.

title: Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
original_title: है जवानी तो इश्क होना है
overview: When Jass leaves his marriage over conflicting priorities, a new romance abroad is upended by shocking revelations, forcing him to confront love, loyalty, and the true meaning of commitment.

title: Governor
overview: Set against Indias 1990 economic crisis, Governor follows Raman, a reluctant bureaucrat unexpectedly appointed as the Governor of the RBI when the nation stands on the brink of bankruptcy. As inflation rises, fuel runs low, and panic spreads, Raman must navigate political pressure and a collapsing system to prevent the country from falling apart.

title: Main Vaapas Aaunga
overview: An elderly man remains haunted by a childhood romance and memories of love lost during the 1947 Partition of India. As he shares his story with his grandson, the past unfolds through memories of migration, longing, and a love that endures across generations.

title: Bharat Bhhagya Viddhaata
overview: Inside Cama Hospital, one of the sites targeted during the 2008 Mumbai terror attacks, nurses, ward boys, cleaners, lift operators, security personnel, and administrative workers keep 400 people alive while armed assailants struck the city around them.

title: Kashmir 1947
overview: Kashmir 1947 vividly recounts the tumultuous events of 1947–48, drawing on firsthand testimonies, military perspectives, seldom-seen archives, and a captivating narrative. The documentary weaves together music, songs, and potent narration, presenting history in a way that resonates with modern viewers, even those of a younger generation.  "Kashmir 1947" is a documentary that educates, resonates, and stirs the soul. The film transforms history, crafting a compelling narrative that resonates with contemporary audiences.

title: Cocktail 2
overview: After a decade together, Diya and Kunal's relationship is shaken when Ally, an old friend, re-enters their lives. What begins as a plan between two women spirals into chaos, triggering hilarious, emotional rollercoaster none of them saw coming.

title: Welcome to the Jungle
overview: The film centers on a chaotic ensemble of bumbling gangsters, ex-dons, and eccentric relatives whose paths cross during a wild, military-style cinematic setup near a border forest.

title: Alpha
overview: Two fierce female agents tackle dangerous missions in a thrilling world of espionage, as they navigate perilous situations, execute daring stunts, and face unexpected turns in this action-packed adventure.

title: Dhamaal 4
overview: Fourth instalment in the Dhamaal franchise.

title: Apology
overview: Three friends find themselves in an unprecedented search for an unknown man around their hometown.

title: Maatrubhumi
overview: Based on the events that took place between the Indian and Chinese troops at the Galwan region on June 15, 2020 when 200 Indian soldiers bravely defended their territory against a force of 1200 Chinese Liberation Army soldiers

title: Awarapan 2
overview: Sequel to Mohit Suri's 2007 cult film 'Awarapan'.

title: VVAN
overview: A rational urban man defies his ancestral forbidden forest & awakens a divine goddess, only to realise that some powers exist beyond logic & he must rise as the village’s only saviour to protect his people from annihilation.

title: Chiranjeevi Hanuman: The Eternal
overview: An AI-generated film about the Hindu god Hanuman; it will draw from the sacred texts of Indian epic 'Ramayana' and Puranic literature to create what producers describe as an “awe-inspiring, visual odyssey designed to be enjoyed as a shared experience in theaters.”

title: Ramayana
overview: An ancient epic follows a young prince and princess whose marriage and subsequent exile mark the beginning of a legendary journey. Their story of love, duty and destiny sets the stage for greater challenges ahead.

title: V. Shantaram
overview: Chronicles Shantaram Rajaram Vankudre, aka V. Shantaram, on his remarkable journey from the silent era through the advent of sound and colour, showcasing his evolution as one of India’s most influential filmmakers.

title: King
overview: Mentor and disciple embark on a perilous journey, pushing their survival skills to the limit against overwhelming odds and unforgiving environments.

title: The Audition
overview: A struggling actor, Nikhil Dagga , 31 stands at the brink of surrender. Broke and beaten down, he retreats to a claustrophobic Mumbai apartment where intrusive neighbors and mounting debts test his resolve. When his final chance at redemption collapses, one desperate, late-night performance becomes an unexpected act of rebellion.

title: Mouthwashing : The Film
overview: The Indian Film Adaptation Of The Bone-Chilling Video Game - Mouthwashing

title: Love and War
overview: A love story set against the backdrop of a war.

title: Naagzilla
overview: In a world where shape-shifting Ichhadhaari naags have been living amongst humans, chaos ensues when a once carefree Ichhadhaari naag's Naagmani and his life are threatened by a wily, power- hungry villain.

title: BAHUBURA
overview: Mr. Teacher, a quiet and principled schoolteacher, is devastated after losing his only child in a tragic road accident. The very same day, at the accident site, he comes across another injured boy-abandoned, nameless, and unconscious. Everyone around looks the other way, but Mr. Teacher steps in to help. As he nurses the boy back to health, he discovers the child is a victim of a deeper evil-caught in the clutches of a trafficking network. What begins as an act of kindness becomes a mission of justice.

title: Stree 3
overview: The eighth installment in the Maddock Supernatural Cinematic Universe. Plot TBA.

title: Chamunda
overview: The seventh installment in the Maddock Supernatural Cinematic Universe. Plot TBA.

title: Mahavatar
overview: Mahavatar tells the epic story of Parashurama, the immortal warrior of dharma from Hindu mythology, whose journey spans ages as he upholds righteousness against the forces of darkness.

title: Maha Munjya
overview: The ninth installment in the Maddock Supernatural Cinematic Universe. Plot TBA.

title: Pehla Mahayudh
overview: The tenth installment in the Maddock Supernatural Cinematic Universe. Plot TBA.

title: Doosara Mahayudh
overview: The eleventh installment in the Maddock Supernatural Cinematic Universe. Plot TBA.
